commissions.title: Commissions
commissions.description: I accept a limited number of commissions each year.If you would like to request a custom painting, feel free to contact me by email.
commissions.details: Commissions can include custom seascapes or artworks inspired by a specific place, memory, or atmosphere.

about.title: About alisi art
about.details: Alina Jecova is a Moldovan artist whose work is rooted in a lifelong love of painting and a quiet sensitivity to beauty, emotion, and atmosphere. Her pieces are created to evoke a sense of pause, warmth, and connection
about.intro: Hi, I’m Alina :) With a background in both fine art and design, I’ve always felt drawn to creating.
about.story: After graduating from art school and earning a Master’s degree in Design, I continued to follow what felt most natural to me – painting. For me, art is a deeply personal language: a way of expressing tenderness, mood, and feeling through color, texture, and form. My work reflects a quiet sensitivity and invites the viewer into a moment of stillness, warmth, and connection.
about.social: I also share my artistic journey through YouTube and social media, where I offer a closer look at my process, inspiration, and the everyday reality of building a creative life.
